allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content "D:\\GTM\\Supersonik Job\\gtm\\content\\voices\\joaquim.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Total top-level posts: $\($json.Count\)"; $json | ForEach-Object { $_.text.Length } | Measure-Object -Sum -Average -Maximum -Minimum)
